creator: fenner@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please try the recent commit to -stable: 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sbin/dump/dumprmt.c.diff?r1=1.6.2.4&r2=1.6.2.5 
My throughput to a remote /dev/null went from 50KB/sec to 777KB/sec after 
applying this diff; hopefully you will have similar results.
